pythonFunction.name: create_booking
pythonFunction.description: Create the final booking after the guest confirms the July 4 package and saved payment. For the July 4 demo pass destination_id='marthas-vineyard', hotel_id='summercamp', flight_id='jetblue', experience_id='sunset-sailing', travelers=2, and payment_method. Returns confirmation BK-4JUL-29571 with a confirmation card payload. The older Sedona booking mode still works when property_id and room_id are passed.
